title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（lobster）为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n 是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码助手的代理框架性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，支持多种功能如图像生成、图像修复、超分辨率等，并提供丰富的扩展和自定义选项。
highlights: 提供直观的网页界面，方便用户使用 Stable Diffusion 模型生成图像。
支持多种采样方法、模型加载和图像处理功能。
拥有活跃的社区和丰富的扩展插件生态。

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让用户分享、发现和收集社区提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: huggingface/transformers
content: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
summary: Hugging Face Transformers 是一个先进的机器学习模型定义框架，支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的推理与训练。
highlights: state-of-the-art machine learning models
text, vision, audio, and multimodal models
for both inference and training

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/opencode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: The Crystallization of Transformer Architectures (2017-2025)
summary: 本文回顾了2017年至2025年间Transformer架构的演变与固化过程，分析了关键设计选择如何从多样探索趋向标准化，并讨论了其对未来AI发展的影响。
highlights: Transformer架构在2017年提出后，经历了从多样化到标准化的‘结晶’过程。
关键设计如层归一化、残差连接和注意力机制的位置逐渐固定。
文章指出，架构的固化可能限制创新，但也提高了工程效率。

title: How finance teams use Codex
content: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.
summary: 本文介绍了金融团队如何利用Codex构建MBR、报告包、差异桥接、模型检查和规划场景，基于实际工作输入。
highlights: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.

title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
summary: 本文介绍了在AWS上训练和部署基础模型（Foundation Models）的关键构建模块，包括计算、存储、网络和优化策略，并提供了实践指南。
highlights: AWS provides scalable infrastructure for foundation model training and inference.
Key building blocks include GPU instances, high-performance storage, and optimized networking.
The article discusses strategies for efficient model parallelism and data loading.
